items.title: JPMorganChase Files Form 10-Q for the Quarter Ended September 30, 2025
items.description: NEW YORK, November 04, 2025--JPMorgan Chase & Co. (NYSE: JPM) ("JPMorganChase" or the "Firm") has filed its Quarterly Report on Form 10-Q for the quarter ended September 30, 2025 with the SEC. The report is available on the SEC's website at https://www.sec.gov and will be available on the Firm's Investor Relations website at https://www.jpmorganchase.com/ir under SEC Filings & Other Disclosures.

items.title: Shopify Stock Falls After Earnings. Why Good Wasn’t Good Enough.
items.description: Shopify  stock was slumping Tueday after third-quarter earnings failed to satisfy Wall Street as investors looked beyond better-than-expected revenue and gross merchandise volume.  Revenue surged 32% to $2.84 billion in the quarter, topping the consensus call for $2.76 billion among analysts polled by  FactSet  Gross merchandise volume from merchant customers rose 32% to $92 billion, topping the 28% gain to $89.12 billion Wall Street had projected.  Shopify stock declined 3.5% following the report Tuesday morning.

items.title: Bank of America’s First Investor Day Since 2011 Is Coming. Why the CEO Is on the Hot Seat.
items.description: Bank of America’s stock has lagged behind rivals, notably industry leader JPMorgan Chase, over the past five years.

items.title: 10 Financials Stocks With Whale Alerts In Today's Session
BAC's Investor Day Preview: Focus on Growth Strategy, Lagging Returns
items.description: Bank of America's first Investor Day in over a decade aims to reignite growth, address lagging returns and sharpen its profitability roadmap.
